sourcePrompt: A battle-damaged Vietnamese shophouse - the same narrow two-story colonial building, shelled. A ragged hole has collapsed one upper corner, exposing floor edges and interior wall; shutters hang skewed, the balcony rail is bent, scorch marks streak up the stucco above the openings, and rubble piles against the shopfront. The far half still. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
